title: 77 Heartwarmings
overview: Eva, who returned to singleness, met and liked each other by chance with Thai Red Star Marvel, while Adam still hoped to exchange Eva's 78th forgiveness through hard work. In order to fulfill her terminally ill mother's wish, Eva considered going into marriage. Can Adam take the opportunity to save true love?
